title: Allow Alternative Views in Widgets to Show Conditional Formatting

posts.author: AliceBQ (Alice)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I would like to request an additional option to the Table Widget where as well as selecting your board you can also select your board view. This way it will default to the visible columns in that board (and allow you to tweak) but more importantly it will also carry over any conditional formatting you have applied to that board so it can be replicated on a dashboard view.

What are you trying to achieve

I would like to request an additional option to the Table Widget where as well as selecting your board you can also select your board view. This way it will default to the visible columns in that board (and allow you to tweak) but more importantly it will also carry over any conditional formatting you have applied to that board so it can be replicated on a dashboard view.
